title: FAA-N16 法律依据与生效 / FAA-N16 basis & effect
point: 依 FAA(2001) 第58条发出,2012年1月1日生效,2021年9月17日最近更新。 / Issued under s.58 of the FAA (2001); took effect 1 Jan 2012; last updated 17 Sep 2021.
keyfacts: 规定投资产品推荐标准 / Sets standards for recommendations on investment products

title: SIP 定义 / Definition of SIP
point: 指定投资产品(SIP)= 除 FAA-N16 附件1所列以外的所有投资产品,分上市与非上市。 / SIPs are all investment products other than those in Annex 1; they may be listed or unlisted.
keyfacts: 上市 SIP 例:期货、ETF / Listed: futures, ETFs
非上市 SIP 例:投资连结寿险 / Unlisted: investment-linked life policies

title: CKA vs CAR
point: 非上市 SIP 用客户知识评估(CKA);上市 SIP 用客户账户审查(CAR,评估衍生品知识)。 / Unlisted SIP → Customer Knowledge Assessment; Listed SIP → Customer Account Review (assessing derivatives knowledge).
keyfacts: CKA 依附件2 / CKA per Annex 2
CAR 依附件3 / CAR per Annex 3

title: CKA / CAR 有效期 / Validity periods
point: CKA 阳性结果有效1年;CAR 结果有效3年(满足交易条件可续)。 / A positive CKA is valid for 1 year; a CAR is valid for 3 years (extendable if transaction conditions are met).
keyfacts: CKA 满1年须重做 / Redo CKA after one year
CAR 满3年须重做,除非期内多次交易上市 SIP / Redo CAR after 3 years unless multiple Listed SIP trades

title: 评估合格门槛 / Qualifying criteria
point: 学历/专业资格/交易经验/工作经验任一可判定具备知识或经验。 / Any of qualifications, professional credentials, transaction experience or work experience can establish knowledge/experience.
keyfacts: 过去3年相关交易≥6次 / ≥6 relevant transactions in 3 years
过去10年≥3连续年相关工作经验 / ≥3 consecutive years' work experience in 10 years

title: 不提供信息的后果 / No information provided
point: 客户不提供教育/投资/工作经验信息,顾问须视其为不具备知识或经验。 / If a client provides no education/investment/work-experience information, deem them not to possess knowledge or experience.
keyfacts: 适用于 CKA 与 CAR / Applies to both CKA and CAR

title: 海外上市产品风险警示 / Overseas-listed risk warning
point: 2018年10月8日起首次推荐海外上市投资产品前,须提供附件4风险警示并取得客户确认;记录保存≥5年。 / Before first recommending an Overseas-Listed Investment Product on/after 8 Oct 2018, provide the Annex 4 risk warning and obtain acknowledgement; keep records ≥5 years.
keyfacts: 记录保存不少于5年 / Records kept not less than 5 years

title: FAA-N03 三大披露原则 / Three disclosure principles
point: 向客户披露信息须:清晰、充分、不虚假或误导。 / Disclosures to clients must be Clear, Adequate, and Not False or Misleading.
keyfacts: 文件至少每年检讨 / Documents reviewed at least annually

title: FAA-N03 第25/26条 / FAA-N03 ss.25 & 26
point: 第25条要求披露推荐指定投资产品的所有重大信息;第26条禁止以欺骗意图作虚假或误导陈述。 / Section 25 requires disclosure of all material information on a recommended designated product; section 26 prohibits false or misleading statements made with intent to deceive.
keyfacts: 直接回应广告须含显著警示(第29段) / Direct response advertising needs a prominent warning (para 29)

title: FAA-N11 适用与除外 / FAA-N11 scope
point: 适用于就双货币投资(DCI)提供建议者,但向合格/专家/机构投资者提供建议除外。 / Applies to advising on a DCI, except where advice is given to accredited, expert or institutional investors.

title: DCI 命名禁令 / DCI naming prohibition
point: 不得以"deposit"或"structured deposit"(及任何语言衍生词)命名或描述 DCI,以免误导本金有保证。 / A DCI must not be named/described using 'deposit' or 'structured deposit' (or any derivative in any language), to avoid misleading clients on principal protection.
keyfacts: DCI 含货币期权,可能以另一货币偿还 / A DCI embeds a currency option; repayment may be in the alternate currency

title: 违反通告罚则 / Penalty for contravention
point: 依第58(5)条,违反通告属犯罪,可处不超过 $25,000 罚款;持续违反每日另罚不超过 $2,500。 / Under s.58(5), contravening a Notice is an offence liable to a fine not exceeding $25,000, with a further $2,500 per day for continuing offences.
keyfacts: 适用于三份通告 / Applies to all three Notices
sourceRef: FAA-N16 para 45 note; FAA-N03 note; FAA s.58(5)
